tasks.prompt: A cute Pikachu-style Pokémon character representing Spring season in traditional Chinese culture. The creature is surrounded by cherry blossoms and green sprouts, wearing a tiny flower crown. Soft pink and green pastel colors, cheerful happy expression with big sparkly eyes. Chibi proportions, rounded simple outlines, clean minimal design, kawaii Japanese art style. Circular composition with white background. No text.
